products.name: CALVION BOLUS
products.heroTitle: A Calcium Bolus With Vitamins & Minerals SHREEM CALVION BOLUS
products.subtitle: A VETERINARY FEED SUPPLEMENT TO ADDRESS CALCIUM DEFICIENCIES & BOOST MILK PRODUCTION IN LIVESTOCK
description: Shreem Calvion Bolus is a veterinary feed supplement to address calcium deficiencies & boost milk production in livestock. It is a high potency blend of essential minerals, vitamins, jivanti & Shatavari. It strengthens skeletal structure & Supports reproductive health. It prevents milk fever.
benefits: It strengthen bones, teeth & provides structural integrity.
It improves the quantity & quality of milk.
It helps in the smooth let down of milk.
It promotes growth in young animals & maintains high energy level in adults.
It improves conception rates & reproductive health.
dosage: Cow/Buffaloes: 1 Bolus twice daily for 7 days. (or as directed by the veterinarian.)
Pregnant Animals: 1 Bolus daily for 3-5 days. (preferably before & after calving)
Sheep/Goat: 1-2 Bolus daily for 3 days. (or as directed by the veterinarian.)

products.name: DIGEXON BOLUS
products.subtitle: A complete formula for healthy digestion & appetite
description: Shreem Digexon Bolus is a veterinary feed supplement to optimise gastro intestinal health in livestock. It contains natural salts & digestive stimulants to address issues like anorexia, indigestion & bloating. It ensures faster recovery from illness and better feed utilization and metabolic health for high yielding animals.
benefits: It improves digestion leading to better milk production & body weight.
Promotes a healthy liver & aids in detoxification.
It improves rumen fermentation.
It normalize ph of rumen.
It Improves gut immunity.
It sanitizes intestinal tract & enhance absorption of nutrients.
dosage: Cow/Buffaloes: 1 Bolus three times daily for 7 days. (or as directed by the veterinarian.)
Sheep/Goat: 1/2 Bolus twice daily for 2-3 days. (or as directed by the veterinarian.)

products.name: ESTRIVA HEAT BOLUS
products.subtitle: A unique non-hormonal oestrus inducer bolus with fertility minerals & vitamins
description: Shreem Estriva Heat Bolus is a non-hormonal reproductive supplement to address silent heat & infertility issues in livestock. It combines a powerful blend of fertility enhancing minerals such as zinc, copper & magnesium. It simulates the reproductive system & ensuring a natural healthy oestrus cycle. It is an ideal solution for improving conception rates.
benefits: It helps in inducing timely & natural oestrus (heat).
It reduce physiological stress & boost immunity.
It act as a natural anti bacterial and immunity booster to protect the reproductive tract.
It ensures the animal stays healthy during the breeding cycle.
dosage: Large Animal: 2-4 Bolus twice daily (or as directed by the veterinarian.)
Small Animal: 1/2 Bolus twice daily. (preferably before & after calving)
Course: Recommended dose should be administered for 4 days.

products.name: LACTIVA BOLUS
products.subtitle: Milk Enhancer Enriched with Minerals and Vitamins
description: Shreem Lactiva Bolus is a nutritional supplement to optimize milk production in diary livestock. It is a blend of essential minerals amino acids & vitamins which addresses the nutritional gaps that cause low milk yield. it boost the quantity of milk, also supports udder health & improves the physiological strength of the animal during lactation cycle.
benefits: Enhances the absorption of calcium & phosphorus for stronger bones & better milk quality.
It boosts milk production naturally.
Enhances physical strength & animals natural resistance.
It reduces the risk of lactation related stress.
dosage: Cow/Buffaloes: 1 Bolus daily for 15 days regular (or as directed by the veterinarian.)
Pregnant Animals: 1 Bolus daily for 3 days
Goat/Sheep: 1/2 Bolus daily for 3 days

products.name: MASTIVA BOLUS
products.subtitle: An advanced formula for udder health & mastitis management
description: Shreem Mastiva Bolus is a nutritional approach to maintain udder health during mastitis. It is a combination of vitamins, minerals, probiotics & trisodium citrate to restore milk ph and reduce inflammation. It helps in the regeneration of milk secreting tissues. It is an essential supportive therapy to maintain milk quality & prevent the recurrence of udder related issues.
benefits: It helps in normalize the ph of milk, making it less favorable for bacterial growth.
It helps in the rapid repair of udder tissues.
It strengthen the natural immunity to fight udder infections.
It improves the consistency and colour of milk.
It maintains gut health.
indications: To improve udder health & prevent recurrence of infections
dosage: Large Animal: 1-2 Bolus for 3-5 days daily (or as directed by the veterinarian.)
In acute cases, the dose can be repeated or as directed by a veterinary consultant

products.name: MINEXA BOLUS
products.subtitle: A High Potency Blend of Essential Minerals & Vitamins
description: Shreem Minexa Bolus is a balanced combination of essential macro and micro minerals to bridge the dietary gap in modern livestock farming. It plays a vital role in maintaining growth, reproduction, milk production & immunity in cattle. By providing critical trace elements, it ensure optimal health, prevents minerals deficiency diseases & supports peak performance throughout the lactation & gestation periods.
benefits: Maintain proper metabolic & physiological functions
Improve feed utilization & digestion
Enhance milk yield & quality
Support reproductive efficiency & fertility
Promotes fagroster growth in young stock & improves overall body condition
Prevents metabolic disorders like milk fever
indications: Prevention of minerals deficiency disorders (milk fever, pica, grass tetany)
dosage: Cow/Buffaloes: 1-2 Bolus daily for high yielding animals (or as directed by the veterinarian.)
Goat/Sheep: 1/2 Bolus daily (or as directed by the veterinarian.)

products.name: SKINTRIX PLUS
products.subtitle: A Nutritional Shield For Skin Health & Immunity
description: Shreem Skin Trix Plus Bolus is a specially formulated veterinary supplement design to provide supportive care in lumpy skin disease & to promote rapid recovery of skin integrity. This bolus contains a balanced combination of vitamins, anti inflammatory agents, immunomodulators & essential minerals which work together to boost immunity promotes faster recovery & improve overall health of affected animals.
benefits: Reducing fever & inflammation
Supporting healing of skin nodules & wounds
Improving resistance against secondary infections
Enhancing milk production & appetite
dosage: Cow/Buffaloes: 2 Bolus daily for 5-7 days (or as directed by the veterinarian.)
Small Animal: 1/2-1 Bolus daily. (preferably before & after calving)

products.name: WORMIVA BOLUS
products.subtitle: Milk Enhancer Enriched with Minerals and Vitamins
description: Shreem Wormiva Bolus is a specially formulated veterinary products design to control & eliminate internal parasites in cattle. This bolus works by targeting and removing harmful worms from the gastro intestinal tract & other organs, thereby helping to restore normal digestion & improve nutrient absorption. It plays a vital role in maintaining optimum body condition, better immunity, higher milk yield & a shiny coat in diary cattle.
benefits: Helps in natural control of internal parasites.
Improves digestion & gut health.
Enhances feed absorption & appetite.
Supports overall immunity & productivity.
Safe for regular use as supplement.
dosage: Large Animals: 1-2 Bolus as a single dose. Give 2 bolus in the evening 1 hour after feeding fodder, do not give anything else afterwards.
Small Animals: 1 Bolus as a single dose. Give 1 bolus in the evening 1 hour after feeding fodder, do not give anything else afterwards.
Heifer/Calves: 1 Bolus as a single dose. Repeat the dose every three months or as directed by a veterinary consultant.

products.name: ACTIVEXON GEL
products.subtitle: Instant Energy • Faster Recovery • Peak Performance
description: Shreem Activexon Gel is a highly effective, fast-acting nutritional gel formulated to provide instant energy and metabolic support in cattle. Designed with a powerful blend of essential nutrients, vitamins, and energy boosters, it helps animals quickly overcome stress, weakness, and energy deficiency conditions. This advanced formulation is ideal for lactating dairy animals, freshly calved cows, and weak or off-feed cattle, supporting rapid recovery, improved stamina, and enhanced productivity. It plays a crucial role during periods of stress such as calving, transportation, illness, or sudden drop in feed intake. With its easy-to-administer gel form and high palatability, Shreem Activexon Gel ensures quick absorption and immediate action, helping maintain optimal performance, better milk yield, and overall animal health.
benefits: Increases milk production
Strengthens bones
Boosts physical strength and energy
Improves immunity
Enhances reproductive health
indications: As an aid to prevent milk fever & associated complication.
As an aid to increase the milk yield.
As an aid to favour the normal contraction of uterus, normal calving & timely expulsion of placenta.
Calcium Active Gel is a comprehensive nutritional supplement formulated to supply the essential nutrients of dairy animals.
dosage: Regular Use: 1 bottle/animal a day for 5-10 days. (or as directed by veterinarian)
To Prevent Milk Fever: Give 1 bottle at the first sign of calving & give another bottle 6-12 hours post calving. Repeat every 12 hours as needed. (or as directed by veterinarian)

products.name: BUFFTRIXA PLUS
products.subtitle: Advanced Rumen Buffer Formula for Effective Acidosis Control, Improved Digestion & Higher Milk Fat
description: Shreem Bufftrixa Plus is a scientifically balanced rumen buffer formulation designed to maintain optimal rumen pH and prevent acidosis in dairy cattle. High-concentrate feeding and modern dairy practices often lead to rumen imbalance, reduced feed efficiency, and low milk fat—this is where Bufftrixa Plus plays a critical role. Formulated with effective buffering agents and supportive nutrients, it stabilizes rumen conditions, enhances fiber digestion, and promotes better nutrient utilization. This results in improved milk yield, increased milk fat percentage, and overall better animal performance. Regular use of Shreem Bufftrixa Plus helps in reducing digestive disorders, improving feed intake, and ensuring healthier and more productive animals, making it an essential solution for high-performing dairy herds.
benefits: Maintains optimal rumen pH balance and effectively prevents acidosis.
Increases milk yield and milk fat percentage
Improves feed efficiency and nutrient absorption
indications: Enhances fiber digestion for better utilization of roughage.
Reduces risk of digestive disorders and feed-related stress
Promotes better feed intake in high-producing animals
Helps in stabilizing rumen conditions during high concentrate feeding
Improves overall animal performance and productivity
Suitable for lactating, high-yielding, and stress-prone cattle
dosage: Cattle: 250-500gm daily to be mixed in feed (or as directed by veterinarian)

products.name: CALPHOVEXON PLUS
products.subtitle: Stronger Bones • Higher Milk Yield • Complete Ca-P Balance
description: Shreem Calphovexon Plus is a scientifically advanced chelated Calcium & Phosphorus liquid formulation designed to ensure optimal mineral balance and superior bioavailability in cattle. Its highly absorbable chelated form supports rapid correction of calcium and phosphorus deficiencies, helping maintain strong bones, better metabolic function, and improved productivity. This powerful formulation is ideal for lactating dairy animals, pregnant cattle, and growing calves, where balanced Ca-P nutrition is essential for milk production, fertility, and skeletal development. It also aids in the prevention and management of metabolic disorders such as milk fever and mineral imbalance conditions. With enhanced palatability and quick action, Shreem Calphovexon Plus ensures faster recovery, improved feed efficiency, and consistent performance, making it an essential supplement for modern dairy management.
benefits: Maximum Bioavailability
Anti-Caking Property
Increases Metabolism
Increases Milk Production
Supports Reproductive Health
indications: Enhance milk production in dairy animals.
For adequate skeletal development & optimum growth of young animals & optimum tonicity, strength of muscles.
dosage: Cow/Buffalo: 100ml daily
Calf & Pig: 40 ml daily
Sheep/Goat: 20ml daily
Chicks & Broilers: 10-20ml daily (each 100 birds)

products.name: CALTRIXA GRANULES
products.subtitle: Advanced Calcium Granules for Strong Bones, Improved Milk Production & Effective Prevention of Milk Fever
description: Shreem Caltrixa Granules is a scientifically formulated calcium supplement designed to meet the high calcium demands of dairy cattle, especially during late pregnancy, calving, and early lactation. Enriched with highly bioavailable calcium sources along with essential co-factors, it ensures rapid absorption and optimal utilization in the body. This advanced formulation helps in the prevention and management of hypocalcemia (milk fever), supports strong bone development, and enhances muscle function. It also plays a vital role in improving milk yield, maintaining metabolic balance, and promoting faster recovery after calving. With regular supplementation, Shreem Caltrixa Granules ensures healthier, stronger, and more productive animals, making it an essential component of modern dairy nutrition programs.
benefits: Supports bone development and strength in livestock.
Enhances calcium absorption and boosts immunity.
Suitable for cattle, buffaloes, heifers, calves, sheep, and goats.
dosage: Cow/Buffalo: 50-80gm daily
Calf & Pig: 15-20gm daily
Sheep/Goat: 15-20gm daily
Heifers: 20-30gm daily

products.name: CALVEXON PLUS
products.subtitle: Stronger Bones • Better Milk Yield • Faster Recovery
description: Shreem Calvexon Plus is an advanced chelated calcium liquid formulation specially designed for cattle to ensure maximum calcium absorption and bioavailability. Enriched with essential minerals and supportive nutrients, it helps in preventing calcium deficiency, improving bone strength, and enhancing overall productivity. This scientifically balanced formula supports lactating animals, pregnant cattle, and growing calves, promoting better milk production, improved fertility, and faster recovery from metabolic stress conditions like milk fever. With its highly palatable liquid form and superior chelation technology, Shreem Calvexon Plus ensures quick action, optimal health, and consistent performance in dairy animals.
benefits: Boosts Milk Production
Supports Liver Health
Provides Instant Energy
Strengthens Bones & Immunity
Enhances Reproductive Health
indications: To improve milk yield in lacting animals.
For better growth and weight gain.
Strengthens bones and improve overall health.
dosage: Cow/Buffalo: 100ml daily
Calf & Pig: 40 ml daily
Sheep/Goat: 20ml daily
Chicks & Broilers: 10-20ml daily (each 100 birds)

products.name: CHELATRIXA PLUS
products.subtitle: Advanced Chelated Mineral Formula for Superior Absorption, Enhanced Productivity & Optimal Animal Health
description: Shreem Chelatrixa Plus is a scientifically formulated chelated mineral mixture designed to deliver essential macro and trace minerals in highly bioavailable forms for dairy and livestock animals. Chelation technology ensures maximum absorption and utilization of minerals, overcoming the limitations of conventional inorganic sources. This advanced formulation supports improved milk yield, reproductive efficiency, immunity, and overall growth performance. It plays a crucial role in preventing mineral deficiencies, enhancing feed efficiency, and maintaining metabolic balance in cattle. Ideal for modern dairy management, Shreem Chelatrixa Plus helps farmers achieve higher productivity, better fertility, and healthier animals, making it a reliable solution for sustainable livestock nutrition.
benefits: Improves Digestion
Boosts Immunity
Enhances Productivity
Strengthens Bones and Teeth
Boosts Energy and Growth
indications: Improve immunity & overall health of animals.
Help to cure Calcium & Phosphorus deficiency diseases.
To Increase milk production in dairy animals.
dosage: Cow/Buffalo: 40-50gm daily to be mixed in feed
Calf & Pig: 20-25gm daily to be mixed in feed
Sheep/Goat: 20-25gm daily to be mixed in feed
Poultry & Fish: 1kg to be mixed in 100 kg feed

products.name: ENERZEXA PLUS
products.subtitle: Powering Performance, Boosting Vitality, Maximizing Milk Yield
description: Shreem Vet Industries presents a scientifically formulated energy booster designed to restore strength, enhance metabolic activity, and support peak productivity in cattle. Enriched with a powerful blend of instant energy sources, essential nutrients, and performance enhancers, this advanced formulation helps animals overcome stress, fatigue, and energy deficiency during critical stages such as lactation, illness, and recovery. It plays a vital role in improving feed utilization, sustaining milk production, and maintaining overall health and vitality. Ideal for dairy farmers seeking consistent performance and faster recovery, this energy booster ensures your livestock stay active, productive, and profitable every day.

composition.ingredient: Gluconeogenic Precursors fortified with B-Complex & Enriched with Bio-active Chromium, Minerals & Amino Acid

benefits: Boosts energy levels
Strengthens immunity
Helpful during stress and weakness
Improves digestion
Provides complete nutrition
indications: Helps to decrease negative energy balance in high lactating cattle.
Helps to reduce risk of ketosis.
dosage: Cattle: 100-200ml daily (or as directed by veterinarian)

products.name: ENZYMAX PLUS
products.subtitle: Advanced Enzyme Power for Superior Digestion & Maximum Feed Utilization
description: Shreem Enzymax Plus is a scientifically developed enzyme-based feed supplement designed to enhance digestion and improve nutrient absorption in cattle. It contains a balanced blend of essential digestive enzymes that help break down complex feed components, optimize rumen function, and increase feed efficiency. Regular use supports better milk yield, improved growth, and overall animal health by reducing digestive disorders and maximizing nutrient availability. Ideal for all types of dairy and farm animals, Shreem Enzymax Plus ensures better performance, productivity, and profitability for farmers.
benefits: Reduces digestive disorders like indigestion, bloating, and acidosis.
Improves growth rate and overall productivity in cattle.
Boosts energy utilization and animal performance.
Supports better immunity and stress management.
Suitable for all stages of dairy animals (calves to high-yield cows).
indications: Improves rumen function and maintains healthy gut microflora.
Increases feed efficiency and reduces feed wastage.
Supports higher milk production and better body condition.
Helps in faster digestion of fiber, protein, and starch.
dosage: Cow/Buffaloes: 20-25gm twice in a day to be mix in the feed
Goat/Sheep: 10gm twice in a day to be mix in the feed
Fishes: 1kg per ton to be mix in the feed

products.name: FATRIXA PLUS
products.subtitle: Advanced Bypass Fat Energy Formula for Higher Milk Yield, Improved Fat % & Optimal Energy Balance
description: Shreem Fatrixa Plus is a premium quality bypass fat supplement specially designed to meet the high energy demands of dairy cattle during early lactation and peak production stages. Formulated with rumen-protected fat, it ensures efficient energy delivery without disturbing normal rumen function. This advanced formula helps improve milk yield and milk fat percentage while preventing negative energy balance, body weight loss, and metabolic disorders like ketosis. It also supports better reproductive performance and overall health in high-yielding animals. With consistent supplementation, Shreem Fatrixa Plus enhances feed efficiency, boosts productivity, and ensures sustained performance, making it an essential nutritional solution for modern dairy farming.
benefits: Enhances milk production.
Improves digestion and gut health.
Boosts energy and body condition.
Strengthens immunity and resistance power.
Supports reproductive health and fertility.
dosage: Large Animals (Cow/Buffalo):
100 gm twice daily for 1 week after calving.
100 gm daily for the next four weeks.
100 gm daily for 15 days before calving.
Mix 1 kg/ 100 kg of feed.

products.name: GROVTRIXA PLUS
products.subtitle: Advanced Growth Promoter for Faster Weight Gain, Improved Feed Efficiency & Superior Dairy Performance
description: Shreem Grovtrixa Plus is a scientifically formulated growth promoter designed to enhance growth rate, feed efficiency, and overall productivity in dairy cattle. It combines essential nutrients, growth-supporting factors, and metabolic enhancers to ensure optimal development and performance. This advanced formulation helps improve nutrient utilization, supports healthy digestion, and promotes faster body weight gain in growing animals. In lactating cattle, it contributes to better milk production and sustained performance by improving overall metabolic efficiency. Regular use of Shreem Grovtrixa Plus leads to stronger, healthier, and more productive animals, making it an ideal solution for modern livestock farming focused on profitability and performance.
benefits: Promotes faster growth and body weight gain in cattle
Supports healthy digestion and gut function
Helps achieve uniform growth in young animals
Supports better reproductive health and fertility
indications: Increases milk yield and overall productivity
Reduces stress and improves overall performance
dosage: Calves (3–12 months): 10–15 grams per animal per day
Growing Heifers: 20–25 grams per animal per day
Adult Cattle (Maintenance): 25–30 grams per animal per day

products.name: IONEXA GEL
products.subtitle: Fast Rehydration. Instant Energy. Superior Recovery.
description: Shreem Ionexa Gel is an advanced ionic rehydration gel specially formulated for cattle to restore electrolyte balance, boost energy levels, and support rapid recovery during stress, dehydration, heat load, and illness. Enriched with essential electrolytes, energy boosters, and vital nutrients, it ensures quick absorption and immediate action. Ideal for use during transportation, heat stress, post-calving weakness, diarrhea, and reduced feed intake, Shreem Ionexa Gel helps maintain optimum hydration, improves vitality, and enhances overall animal performance. Its easy-to-administer gel format ensures convenience and effective dosing even in weak or off-feed animals.
benefits: Strengthens bones
Boosts immune system
Increases energy and appetite
Prevents magnesium deficiency
Improves milk production
indications: Increase mobilization of calcium from bone to blood.
Vitamin D3 ensures maximum absorption of calcium in the intestine.
dosage: Regular USe: 300gm before & 300gm after 6 hours of parturition. (or as directed by veterinarian)
To Prevent Milk Fever: Give 300gm after 6 hours of I.V. in fusion, followed by another 300gm after next 6 hours. (or as directed by veterinarian)

products.name: LIVEXON PLUS
products.subtitle: Powerful Liver Protection • Better Digestion • Higher Productivity
description: Shreem Livexon Plus is an advanced liver tonic specially formulated for cattle to support optimal liver function, detoxification, and improved metabolic efficiency. Enriched with potent herbal extracts and essential nutrients, it helps stimulate appetite, enhance digestion, and promote better nutrient utilization. This powerful formulation is ideal for lactating animals, growing calves, and stressed cattle, aiding in faster recovery from toxin exposure, feed-related stress, and liver dysfunction. It supports improved milk yield, better feed conversion, and overall health performance. With its highly palatable liquid form and fast-acting ingredients, Shreem Livexon Plus ensures effective liver care, making it an essential supplement for maintaining productivity and wellness in modern dairy farming.
benefits: Supports Liver Function
Aids Detoxification
Boosts Immunity
Improves Digestion
Enhances Milk Production
indications: To help maintain normal Liver function.
For liver metabolism stimulant for better production & performance.
dosage: Cow/Buffalo: 50ml daily
Calf & Pig: 25ml daily
Sheep/Goat: 25ml daily
Chicks & Broilers: 5-10ml daily (each 100 birds)

products.name: TOXTRIXA PLUS
products.subtitle: Advanced Mycotoxin Binder for Superior Feed Safety, Liver Protection & Enhanced Dairy Performance
description: Shreem Toxtrixa Plus is a scientifically developed toxin binder formulated to effectively bind and neutralize harmful mycotoxins present in animal feed. Mycotoxins such as aflatoxins, ochratoxins, and other fungal toxins can severely impact animal health, productivity, and profitability. This advanced formulation combines high-quality toxin-binding agents with supportive components to protect the liver, strengthen immunity, and improve overall animal performance. It helps in reducing the toxic load, enhancing nutrient utilization, and maintaining feed quality. Regular use of Shreem Toxtrixa Plus ensures safer feed consumption, improved milk yield, better reproductive efficiency, and healthier animals, making it an essential solution for modern dairy farming.
benefits: Enhances nutrient absorption and feed efficiency
Reduces risk of toxin-related health disorders
Supports better reproductive performance
Improves overall animal health and performance
indications: Effectively binds and neutralizes mycotoxins (aflatoxin, ochratoxin, etc.)
Protects liver function and supports detoxification
Increases milk yield and overall productivity
dosage: Cattle: 500gm-1kg per ton feed (or as directed by veterinarian)

products.name: UTEROFIX POWDER
products.subtitle: Strong Support for Uterine Stability & Faster Recovery
description: Shreem Uterofix Powder is a scientifically formulated uterine support supplement designed to aid in the management and prevention of prolapse in cattle. It helps in improving uterine tone, strengthening reproductive tissues, and promoting faster recovery after calving or prolapse conditions. Enriched with essential minerals, herbal extracts, and supportive nutrients, it ensures optimal reproductive health, reduces recurrence risk, and enhances overall productivity of dairy animals. Ideal for use during pre- and post-calving periods, Shreem Uterofix Powder is a reliable solution for maintaining uterine integrity and animal well-being.
benefits: Boosts Immunity
Reduces Inflammation
Improves Digestion
Enhances Reproductive Health
Increases Strength and Energy
indications: Helps in the proper involution of uterus and vagina to its anatomical position.
Increases uterine muscle tone and strengthens the uterus, thus reducing the chances of reoccurrence.
Effective in both pre-partum and post-partum prolapse. Safe for pregnant animals.
dosage: In Large Animals: 50 gm powder twice daily should be given with 250 gm mustard oil or water for 3 days.
In Small Animals: 25 gm powder twice daily should be given with 125 gm mustard oil or water for 3 days.

products.name: UTERONEXA PLUS
products.subtitle: Restore Uterine Health, Enhance Fertility, Ensure Better Conception
description: Shreem Vet Industries brings you an advanced uterine tonic specially formulated to support reproductive health and optimize fertility in cattle. This scientifically balanced formulation helps in uterine cleansing, promotes faster involution after calving, and aids in the management of common reproductive disorders such as retained placenta, metritis, and repeat breeding. Enriched with powerful herbal extracts, essential nutrients, and reproductive stimulants, it enhances uterine tone, improves hormonal balance, and prepares the animal for successful conception. Regular use supports better reproductive efficiency, reduces calving intervals, and ensures improved productivity for dairy farmers. An ideal solution for maintaining a healthy uterus, boosting fertility, and achieving consistent breeding success in cattle.
benefits: Improves reproductive health
Boosts immunity
Reduces physical weakness
Supports milk production
Improves digestion
indications: Increases milk quantity & quality after Parturition.
As prophylactic after Parturition: For timely Expulsion of placenta, lochial discharge & timely involution of Uterus.
dosage: Cow/Buffalo: 50-60ml daily
Calf & Pig: 10-20ml daily
Sheep/Goat: 10-20ml daily
Female Camel: 60-75ml daily

products.name: ACIDIXA PLUS
products.subtitle: Powerful Water Acidifier for Better Gut Health & Maximum Performance
description: Shreem Acidixa Plus is a scientifically advanced water acidifier specially formulated to improve gut health, enhance digestion, and control harmful microbial load in poultry. It contains a balanced blend of organic and inorganic acids that effectively reduce water pH, creating an unfavorable environment for pathogenic bacteria while promoting beneficial gut microflora. This powerful formulation supports better nutrient absorption, improves feed efficiency, and helps birds perform optimally under stress conditions such as heat, vaccination, and disease challenges.
benefits: Maintains healthy intestinal pH.
Supports optimum performance & enzyme activity.
Controls harmful bacteria like salmonella & E.coli.
Improves digestion & nutrient absorption.
Promotes eggshell quality & overall growth.
dosage: For Feed (Broilers/Layers): 50ml-1ltr per ton of feed (or as directed by veterinarian)
Breeders: 1-1.5ltr per ton of feed (mix the volume with 5-15ltr of water & sprinkle on feed for uniform mixing)
For Drinking Water: 0.25-0.5ml per ltr of drinking water (or as directed by veterinarian)

products.name: CALTRIXA PLUS
products.subtitle: Advanced Calcium & Phosphorus Formula for Strong Bones, Better Growth & Optimum Poultry Performance
description: Shreem Caltrixa Plus is a scientifically balanced liquid supplement of Calcium and Phosphorus, specially formulated to support strong skeletal development, improved growth, and enhanced productivity in poultry. It plays a vital role in maintaining bone strength, eggshell quality, and overall metabolic functions in birds. In modern poultry production, rapid growth rates and high egg production demand optimal mineral nutrition. Deficiency of calcium and phosphorus can lead to weak bones, poor weight gain, lameness, and reduced eggshell quality. Shreem Caltrixa Plus helps in maintaining the correct mineral balance, ensuring proper bone formation and structural integrity. Its highly bioavailable formulation promotes better absorption and utilization of essential minerals, leading to improved growth performance, stronger bones, and higher production efficiency. Regular supplementation supports healthy, active birds with improved feed conversion and overall farm profitability.

composition.ingredient: Calcium, Phosphorus, Vit. A, Vit. d3, Vit. B12, Sodium, Magnesium, Manganese, Zinc, Copper

benefits: Essential for preventing 'Cage Layer Fatigue' and rickets in fast-growing broilers.
High levels of Manganese and Zinc prevent tendon slipping (Perosis) and lameness, ensuring birds stay mobile and reach feed/water easily.
Provides breeders with the necessary mineral reserves to ensure strong embryo development and high hatch percentages.
Superior eggshell quality.
Skeletal integrity.
Leg strength.
Hatchability booster.
Stress recovery.
dosage: Chicks: 15ml/100 birds per day (or as directed by veterinarian)
Growers: 30ml/100 birds per day (or as directed by veterinarian)
Layers: 60ml/100 birds per day (or as directed by veterinarian)

products.name: CENVITRIXA PLUS
products.subtitle: Advanced Vitamin C Solution for Stress Relief, Immunity Boost & Peak Poultry Performance
description: Shreem Cenvitrix Plus is a high-quality Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid) liquid supplement specially designed to support poultry during stress conditions and enhance overall immunity. In modern poultry farming, birds are frequently exposed to stress factors such as heat, vaccination, transportation, and disease challenges, which can negatively impact growth and productivity. Shreem Cenvitrix Plus helps in reducing stress by improving the bird's natural defense system and maintaining physiological balance. It plays a crucial role in boosting immunity, improving feed intake, and enhancing resistance against infections. Regular use helps improve flock health, survivability, and overall production efficiency.
benefits: Enhances iron absorption and maintains overall health.
Reduces oxidative damage caused by environmental factors.
Enhances egg production, egg weight, and shell quality in layers.
Protects birds from stress due to temperature fluctuations, feed changes, or high production cycles.
Bioflavonoids offer superior antioxidant strength compared to common synthetic options.
indications: To aid faster recovery after illness.
dosage: Chicks: 5/100 birds per day (or as directed by veterinarian)
Growers: 7ml/per 100 birds per day (or as directed by veterinarian)
Layers: 10ml/100 birds per day (or as directed by veterinarian)

products.name: COCCIKILL
products.subtitle: Ensuring Better Gut Health & Higher Productivity
description: Shreem Coccikill is an advanced and highly effective poultry health supplement specially formulated for the prevention and control of coccidiosis in poultry. Developed by Shreem Vet Industries, it offers a reliable and sustainable solution to manage intestinal health and improve overall bird performance. Coccidiosis is one of the most common and economically significant diseases affecting poultry, leading to poor growth, reduced feed efficiency, and increased mortality. Shreem Coccikill works by targeting and controlling coccidial infection, thereby supporting better nutrient absorption and faster growth.
benefits: Effective prevention and control of coccidiosis.
Helps reduce intestinal lesions and oocyst shedding.
Protects against secondary bacterial infections.
Enhance gut integrity and nutrient absorption.
Boosts immune response with vitamins and probiotics.
dosage: Prevention: 10ml/100 birds daily (or as directed by veterinarian)
Treatment: 30ml/100 birds daily for 3-5 days (or as directed by veterinarian)

products.name: CUFRIXA PLUS
products.subtitle: Advanced Respiratory Support Formula for Fast Relief from Cough & Breathing Stress in Poultry
description: Shreem Cufrixa Plus is a scientifically formulated respiratory support powder designed to help manage cough, breathing discomfort, and respiratory stress in poultry. It works effectively to soothe irritated airways, reduce congestion, and promote easier breathing, ensuring better comfort and health of birds. Its balanced formulation supports the respiratory system during challenging conditions such as seasonal changes, ammonia exposure, dust, and infectious stress. By improving oxygen intake and reducing respiratory load, Shreem Cufrixa Plus helps maintain optimal growth, feed intake, and overall flock performance.

It plays a vital role in controlling fungal growth, improving water sanitation, and maintaining a cleaner environment for birds. With its strong antimicrobial and antifungal properties, Shreem Cuprixa Plus helps reduce the load of harmful pathogens in drinking water systems, thereby promoting better gut health and overall performance of poultry. It is especially useful during conditions of high humidity and contamination risk, where fungal challenges are common. Manufactured with precision and quality standards by Shreem Vet Industries, this solution ensures reliable efficacy, easy solubility, and safe usage when applied as recommended. It is an essential addition to modern poultry management practices aimed at improving productivity and flock well-being.

Heat stress is one of the major challenges in poultry farming, leading to reduced feed intake, poor growth rate, decreased egg production, and higher mortality. Shreem Heatrelixa Plus helps maintain the bird's physiological balance by supporting thermoregulation, improving hydration status, and enhancing electrolyte balance. It supports better feed conversion ratio (FCR), reduces stress-related weakness, and helps birds maintain normal productivity even under harsh summer conditions.

It plays a crucial role in preventing and managing gout conditions, improving kidney health, and enhancing overall bird performance. In modern poultry farming, high-protein diets, rapid growth rates, and environmental stress can lead to kidney overload and uric acid accumulation, resulting in gout and reduced productivity. Shreem Renatrixa Plus helps in maintaining proper acid-base balance, promotes efficient excretion of uric acid, and supports healthy kidney function. Its advanced formulation works to detoxify the system, reduce metabolic stress, and improve hydration status, ensuring better feed efficiency, growth, and livability. Regular use helps birds stay active, reduces mortality associated with kidney disorders, and supports consistent and profitable poultry production.

products.name: TOXITRIX PLUS
products.subtitle: Advanced Mycotoxin Binder for Complete Protection Against Feed Toxins & Enhanced Poultry Performance
description: Shreem Toxitrix Plus is a scientifically developed toxin binder designed to effectively adsorb and neutralize harmful mycotoxins present in poultry feed. Its advanced formulation helps protect vital organs such as liver and intestines from toxin damage, ensuring better health and productivity of birds. By binding a wide range of mycotoxins and preventing their absorption in the gastrointestinal tract, Shreem Toxitrix Plus supports improved nutrient utilization, stronger immunity, and enhanced feed efficiency. It plays a crucial role in reducing the negative impact of contaminated feed, including poor growth, reduced egg production, and immunosuppression.

Shreem Toxitrixa Plus works by effectively binding and neutralizing toxins in the gastrointestinal tract, preventing their absorption into the bloodstream. It supports liver function, enhances nutrient utilization, and improves overall bird health and performance. With its fast-acting liquid formulation, Shreem Toxitrixa Plus ensures uniform mixing in drinking water, providing consistent protection across the flock. It is an essential solution for maintaining optimal health, boosting immunity, and maximizing production efficiency in poultry.

products.name: VALIN-COOL
products.subtitle: Advanced Heat Stress Relief Solution for Improved Comfort, Performance & Productivity in Poultry

It helps birds stay hydrated, active, and productive even under extreme weather stress. Formulated with a balanced combination of electrolytes, cooling agents, and supportive nutrients, Shrevalin-Cool aids in restoring fluid and mineral balance, reducing body temperature, and improving feed intake and overall performance. It is highly beneficial during summer seasons, transport stress, vaccination stress, and overcrowded housing conditions where birds are prone to dehydration and heat exhaustion.
